solidity_calculate_release.code: function calculateRelease(uint256 currentBlock, uint256 cliffEndBlock, uint256 vestingEndBlock, uint256 totalSupply) view returns (uint256 released, uint256 remaining, uint256 percentage) { cliffDuration = vestingEndBlock - cliffEndBlock; if (currentBlock <= cliffEndBlock) { return (0, totalSupply, 0); } vestingDuration = vestingEndBlock - cliffEndBlock; if (currentBlock >= vestingEndBlock) { return (totalSupply, 0, 10000); // 10000 = 100% } progress = (currentBlock - cliffEndBlock) * 10000 / vestingDuration; released = totalSupply * progress / 10000; remaining = totalSupply - released; return (released, remaining, progress / 100); }

python_calculate_release.code:
import json
def calculate_release_efficiency(total_supply, start_block, cliff_end_block, vesting_end_block, current_block):
    cliff_duration = cliff_end_block - start_block
    vesting_duration = vesting_end_block - cliff_end_block
    
    if current_block <= cliff_end_block:
        released = 0
        remaining = total_supply
        percentage = 0
    elif current_block >= vesting_end_block:
        released = total_supply
        remaining = 0
        percentage = 100
    else:
        vesting_blocks = vesting_end_block - cliff_end_block
        progress = (current_block - cliff_end_block) / vesting_blocks
        released = total_supply * progress
        remaining = total_supply - released
        percentage = progress * 100
    
    return {
        'released': released,
        'remaining': remaining,
        'percentage': percentage,
        'cliff_duration': cliff_duration,
        'vesting_duration': vesting_duration
    }
